persona.description: female, 27, perfectionist who restarts every Monday
persona.goal: swapped all-or-nothing plans for small tracked habits

segments.text: She stopped trying to be perfect.
Every Monday: new plan. Every Friday: quit.
New rule: just keep the score green.

visual.motion: Health Score screen, four small wins logged

segments.text: Small days count. That's the point.

visual.motion: treadmill walking clip with score overlay

assets.before_prompt: unedited amateur photo taken on a phone, slightly grainy, harsh overhead fluorescent lighting, realistic ordinary body, imperfect skin with natural texture, candid slightly awkward posture, no retouching, no studio lighting, muted colors, looks like a real photo posted on reddit. A 27-year-old woman in leggings and an old hoodie, tired after work, phone mirror selfie in a hallway, ordinary build, neutral expression.
assets.after_prompt: Keep the EXACT same person, face, and identity as the reference. Same location and framing, same amateur phone-photo quality. Believable result of 90 days of consistent training — NOT a fitness model; still has natural soft spots, just visibly leaner and healthier. Same hallway mirror selfie, better posture, brighter face, relaxed easy smile.
footage_prompts: static handheld phone video, subtle camera shake like someone filming casually, natural movement, no cuts, no zoom, realistic ordinary footage. A woman in an old hoodie closing a fridge in a dim kitchen at night and pausing, lit by the fridge light.

static handheld phone video, subtle camera shake like someone filming casually, natural movement, no cuts, no zoom, realistic ordinary footage. The same woman walking at an easy pace on a home treadmill in daylight, headphones in, unbothered.

audio.vibe: warm acoustic loop, soft swell into the 90-days-later reveal
audio.source: licensed/trending track chosen at assembly, muxed with -shortest

caption:
All-or-nothing was the problem, not the discipline. 🌱

She stopped chasing perfect weeks and just kept her daily score green — sleep, food, water, steps. 90 days of small days. Save this if you keep restarting on Mondays. 🔖

Vibe Health scores the small stuff so it finally adds up → link in bio.
youtube_title: She Stopped Trying to Be Perfect — 90 Days Later
notes: Hook is footage, not a still — fridge clip generated via seedance_2_0 (9:16 1080p flags mandatory).
